review_text: Great caravan Park in awesome location

People’s Park is fantastic! I’ve stayed multiple times on front row powered sites. Every time the staff have been so welcoming and so friendly. The location is great with beach right across the road. I highly recommend Peoples Park

Great park. Have been to people’s park 3 times and never disappoints. Had the best week stay. Not crammed in like other parks and heaps of space on each site. Facilities are clean and ground staff very friendly and helpful.

Great campsite.right across from the beach, close to the bakery, very well maintained and very clean showers, toilets, kitchen etc.
Would definitely recommend
Excellent evening stay at People’s Park, good facilities, amazing location and everything well organised from check in to leaving.

We an absolutely loved Coral Bay.
The staff at People’s Park were outstanding. So friendly & very accommodating.
I highly recommend staying here

Stayed 2 nights on site (camping, not villa). The grounds are well looked after and ample services onsite. Downside is the showers as they were poor pressure and never seemed to have hot water. Not always an issue on a hot day, but of an evening it was super cold!

Nice site and great location. For an expensive stay in a powered site there is an expectation of drinking water to your site. Do only have bore water should be reflected in price considering almost no pressure made using it pointless.
Mmm average park i wouldn't say its worth the $100 per night van site up in the nose bleed section, when u can go to the bay view next door nicer park more for the kids and $25 cheaper per night

We were disappointed, do not recommend. Biggest disappointment on our whole  West Coast Road Trip. Their interest: make money,

What we didn’t like
• Too expensive for what you get, for this reason not a “People’s Park”
• Construction on the neighboring property, that is why we didn’t stay on our beach front campsite, moved to a minor category site
• We paid 1 night double (fears of cyclone) and there is no flexibility / human kindness from costumer service / management to make you feel understood in special circumstances
• Coral Bay itself has not much to offer (compared with Exmouth etc)

What we liked:
• Well organized
• Quiet on the campsite far from construction, mostly elderly persons
• Good facilities, even though not modern

After all, we didn’t feel welcome / comfortable

April 2026: Es hat nun einen Spielplatz. Die Sanitäranlagen sind alle älter, jedoch sauber. Personal ist freundlich. Hatten den Stellplatz 84 der riesig ist. Die Küche ist gut ausgestattet. In der Nacht ist es so ruhig.
November 2019: Ordentlicher Caravan Park. Nach uns wurden die einen Plätze (Seafront) erneuert. Hat schattige und sonnige Stellplätze. WC und Duschen sind soweit sauber. Hat einen Trinkwasserposten. Um den Campertank zu fühlen gibt es Salzwasser, was auch okey ist. In der Nacht war die Ruhe genial. Der Strand und das Meer ist wunderschön. Kein WIFI.
I didn't appreciate an all night harassment of text messages 2 years after I stayed there.

We loved our stay at Peoples Park. Our cabin was immaculate and the beds were very comfy. The park is in a prime spot so close to the beach, restaurants and shops. Would highly recommend and love to stay again.
Sending endless spam texts msg about the 5hp speed limit
Sehr schöner Campingplatz, direkt am Strand. Hat uns sehr gefallen. Jedoch ziemlich teuer.

We’ve been returning to People’s Park for over 20 years. Staff are incredibly friendly and welcoming. They are constantly working and upgrading facilities . Nice big sites for vans and tents. We always have a fantastic stay.

No concerns about people’s safety. No offer for a refund despite a cyclone nearby and official evacuations are advised. Extremely greedy and outrageous behaviour. They are completely unwilling to offer any refund despite serious weather and safety concerns.

Honestly this is by far the worst customer experience I’ve ever had. Almost 90 AUD for a campsite that complete disregards safety guidelines of the Australian government. I’m in utter disbelief.

All other campsites nearby, as well as the tours we have booked have already reached out and given a refund. This campsite, however shows blatant indifference to your safety and situation.

This campsite’s complete lack of responsibility in the face of potentially life-threatening conditions is unacceptable and deeply disappointing.

Updated: even though they are evacuating the premises and forcing us to leave they will still not provide a refund. Stating: “Your safety is our top priority.” But still stating “Refunds are not being offered.”
Sounds like they are most concerned with their financial situation more than their customer experience.
Fantastic week spent in paradise. Lovely park, lovely people. Staff very attentive and keep the place immaculate.

Lovely little caravan park - we stayed ocean front which was stunning. Staff were amazing and very helpful when we had to change out dates. Amenities are clean and well looked after. Also great tour company right next door that do an amazing manta ray Snorkling tour
Very nice camping spot. Nice helpful camp workers. Showers etc. good and clean. Near to the beach and eating place. I can recommend it.

After travelling full time for 8 years, this is the most expensive caravan park we've ever been to, and the most poorly appointed. Extremely disappointing, and nothing but a cash grab. I'll make sure to tell all to avoid Coral Bay, and to go to Exmouth instead.

Rooms are nice but don’t stay here if you like your personal information shared. Staff have no consideration for safety or care for privacy. Any one can call and they’ll easily share your information.. yes I complained internally and professionally first with a ‘not my problem’ response from management. Otherwise a great location but feel others have a right to know

Super Campingplatz
Hat alles was man braucht
Gute Lage direkt vor dem Strand
Wundervolle Kulisse
Toiletten und Duschen sind sauber was braucht man mehr ?!:)
Landry Service gibt's auch
Würden aufjedenfall wieder kommen

Camped here Jan 2026. Had a great site, large and grassed. Facilities were clean,  and plentiful, but the location was the most awesome bit.  This was low season, have stayed in Coral bay in peak season and that's a totally different vibe - avoid at all costs if you can.
Great park and amenities
Fantastic stay thank you. Lovely and clean rooms and caravan park. Lovely staff. Across the street from the beach. Close to everything.  Definitely recommend ❤️👌
Loved our stay in the one bedroom cabins. Aircon in both rooms. Bunk beds for kids. The staff are fantastic.  It's right across from the beach. Very clean... Highly recommend Peoples park. Thank you
Super emplacement et grande place pour les grosses caravanes endroit également très calme.
This is our favourite holiday spot! The location across the road from the Bay is amazing, staff are lovely and everything is clean. Cant wait to be back again next year!
Good stuff cheers

A great place to stay in Coral Bay. The people are very friendly and welcoming, the park is clean and well maintained, and the views are fantastic. It’s a relaxed spot with a great atmosphere, perfect for enjoying everything Coral Bay has to offer. Would happily stay here again.

Bonjour,
Que dire, un peu mitigé !
Les douches et sanitaires ne sont pas très propres avec une odeur d’urine la plupart du temps. Il y a également un problème avec les souris qui grouillent de partout la nuit, dommage qu’ils ne traitent pas le problème…
Cependant, la cuisine est propre, bien équipée et fraîche. De plus, le personnel reste agréable et serviable

Great location
Too many mice at night
Unpowered site: very nice spot, right next to the beach, amenities nice and clean,

Lovely caravan park, each site is very spacious.  Facilities are clean, but soon some toilets will need updating.
Staff friendly.
Wow what a beautiful spot.  Grassy shaded caravan spots with clean bathrooms and camp kitchen. Shops nearby and right over the road from the bay.  Short walk to restaurants and bakery 👌
Perfect location right across from the beach (no view, but a short walk) clean cabin, friendly staff. All the requisite facilities, and a cafe at the front.
Nous avons loué un bungalow une chambre avec vue sur la mer.|Très propre et confortable, bien équipé.|La vue est agréable.|Les extérieurs sont très bien entretenus et l’accès à la plage très facile.

We spent two nights here with friends (2 sea view units) location is good and the park is well run with friendly staff. However on the first night my husband and I got covered in bites after going to sleep. Our friends that we had spent all day and evening with but had the unit next door were fine. We raised the  issue and the team took it very seriously changing bedding etc and using pest spray (I assume worried about bed bugs - which they weren’t) my main problem is that they would not let us change units and we got absolutely savaged again the next night. We’ve been in Oz two weeks and had no bites before or after. It’s now a week later and the bites have just about stopped itching, it’s put quite a dampener on the holiday and although no idea what it was it was definitely something in the unit. Would like to have been offered some form of compensation.

Cadre fantastique et très bien situé |Plusieurs excursions et attractions à portée de main |Le complexe est récent |Équipements modernes et agréables |Le seul point négatif pour nous était la salle de bain car nous avions l impression d être à l hopital sinon le reste est spacieux et agréable |Nous avons eu beaucoup de mouches et d insectes car le complexe est en pleine nature et nous avons du mettre toutes nos affaires bien fermées
Stayed in cabin 9 in front area of park. It was absolutely beautifully located and had everything we needed. Clean cool and enough space

Hadden uitzicht op zee, mooi. Personeel erg vriendelijk! 3 sterren omwille van de ontelbaar vele muizen op het terrein, en de watersproeiers die constant draaien. Jammer dat RAC dicht was, anders hadden we zeker die gekozen.
staff nice beach great BUT packed in like sardines ,couldn't move !
Perfect location! We booked oceanfront view caravan spot and we couldn't get closer to the beach if we tried. Absolutely amazing

Coral bay is a lovely place and I would highly recommend this for a day trip but I would not recommend staying!! When we checked in with our campervan the staff were lovely - however as we were about to leave for our spot, they quickly said “oh the town has a bit of a mice problem just now just don’t leave rubbish out and you will be fine”. So we listened. “A bit” was an understatement. |We did not leave out any food, any rubbish anything. All we had was wipes in the front of the van - we then heard rustling, a mouse was in the front seat. It had gotten in from under the van as we never left anything open. |Then another one scurried along the bed. When I got out the whole park was covered with them running about - so it made for an interesting drive to our next location at 2am. |I understand that a problem like this can’t be helped and I assume the other parks are the same, but it also didn’t look like they were doing anything at all to deal with the situation?? 1/10 would not recommend.

Als we 0 sterren konden geven hadden we dat gedaan. Verschrikkelijk park met de slechtste service ooit.

Het allerergste aan dit park is de muizenplaag. Tijdens de tweede nacht hadden we al wat muizen gespot bij de keuken. De derde en tevens laatste nacht op onze powered site kwamen de muizen bij ons op bezoek in de campervan. Die beesten maken vrij veel geluid dus er door heen slapen is geen optie. Over deze muizenplaag is ook niks gecommuniceerd, anders hadden we natuurlijk nooit geboekt hier. De receptioniste zei dat het in een e-mail stond; nadat ze had gecheckt of dat zo was bleek er niks vermeld te zijn. Ook mochten we geen stofzuiger lenen om de muizenkeutels weg te halen. We werden verwezen naar Exmouth, daar kan je de bus uit stofzuigen. Dat is dus 2,5 uur rijden. Meerdere mensen ‘s nachts gesproken omdat ook zij wakker waren dankzij muizen in hun caravan. Het noodnummer van het park nam de muizen klacht op door te zeggen dat alle muizenvallen al vergeven waren. Later toch eentje gevonden die we telkens zelf mochten legen. Geen oog dicht gedaan dus.

Daarnaast bij aankomst de code voor het toiletgebouw gekregen. Die avond kregen we een berichtje dat dat gebouw zou gaan sluiten wegens verbouwingen. Daardoor de volgende dagen iedere keer ongeveer 5 minuten gelopen wanneer we naar de wc wilden gaan. Ook hadden we de code van dat andere gebouw niet, daar zijn we zelf naar op zoek moeten gaan.

Laatste irritatie punt zijn de sproeiers. Overal staan sproeiers die gedurende de dag worden verzet. Zelfs naar je eigen plaats die voornamelijk bestaat uit zand waardoor je een camping stoel dus kan neerzetten op een modderige ondergrond. Zelfs ‘s avonds word je nat gesproeid als je naar de keuken wil lopen.
Great place for swimming  and snorkelling as the beautiful beach and bay was right across the road. Facilities clean and of a high standard. Beach front sites are large and flat
Great place to enjoy swimming and snorkelling with the beach across the road. Plenty of restaurants within walking distance.

Die Top Hill Lage des Häuschen war gut. Die Ausstattung ist gut mit einer modernen Waschmachine. Die Wäsche kann man draussen im Wind und der Sonne trocknen lassen. Sehr schön. Zu Fuss ist es nicht weit zum Strand, Restaurants und Einkaufsladen.||Nicht gefallen · Leider liegt Cabin 16 direkt neben einem hohen Umsetzer. Der Ausblick ging nicht in einen Garten, sondern zu den Stahlverstrebungen und dem Masten des Umsetzers.

Good checkin, great caravan site with easy access to beach but not worth the money at $90 a night for a powered site.  The water was non portable bore water with access to drinking water via using own bottles and one tap in the bottom section of the park where we were located.  The amenities whilst clean need an upgrade particularly with the price.  We had stayed the previous night at RAC Exmouth which I would give a 10 out of 10.  Very disappointing.

Beim vorigen Post hört sich das sehr wild an, ich weiss nicht, welches Fahrzeug sie hatten. Heute, 1 Woche später, gab es 1 Maus am Kochplatten und 1 Richtung Bad. Am Auto und nachts war gar nichts..campervan.
Zum Besuch der Babysharks unbedingt sie Tidenzeiten beachten

Wir waren drei Nächte in der Ocean View Villa für zwei Personen. Es war eine der besten Unterkünfte unserer bisherigen Reise. Neuwertig, geräumig mit Küche, Kaffeekapselmaschine und Waschmaschine, toller Terrasse mit Meerblick. Jetzt im Oktober war es am Tag warm, aber nachts konnte man es dank Fliegengitter an der Terrassentüre und den Fenstern gut ohne Klimaanlage aushalten. Im Badezimmer gab es toll duftende Pflegemittel und einen Föhn. Es war nur ein kleiner Teil der Villen und dem unter der Terrasse gelagerten Campingplatz besetzt, so dass himmlische Ruhe herrschte.
All good would use again 😃

Achtung: der Platz bzw. ganz Coral Bay ist voll von Mäusen!! (mehr dazu im Text)

Wir haben 2 Nächte auf einen Platz mit Strom verbracht. Grundsätzlich ist die Lage des Platzes sehr nah am Meer und ist mit den vielen Palmen wunderschön angelegt. Allerdings hat man bei den normalen Plätzen keinerlei Sicht auf das Meer. Dafür sind 85$ pro Nacht enorm viel. Die Plätze am Meer sind entsprechend noch teurer.

Die Einrichtungen, Toilette, Dusche usw. waren von unserem Platz ziemlich weit entfernt. Wir reisten mit 2 Kleinkindern und hatten schon hohe Erwartungen, weil es auch der teuerste Platz unserer Reise ist. Es gab aber für die Kinder quasi gar nichts. Keinen Pool und der Spielplatz umfasst ein Klettergerüst, welches aber auch ein Bauzaun darstellen könnte. - Schade!

Nun aber zu unserem persönlichen Albtraum. Wir hatten in der ersten Nacht direkt Besuch von 3-4 Mäusen in unserem Wohnmobil. Aufgrund der Lautstärke die Mäuse eben so verursachen beim
Wühlen/Knabbern/Klettern, haben wir als Familie keinen Schlaf gefunden. Die 2. Nacht, nun ausgerüstet mit Mausefallen war dann eine Katastrophe. Die Mäuse krabbelten überall! Über das Wohnmobil, im Wohnmobil, einfach überall. Wir fingen mit den Fallen in der Nacht insgesamt 17 Mäuse. Wieder keinen Schlaf bekommen und einiges an Lebensmitteln, die nun weggeworfen werden mussten. Wir können dem Campingplatz keine Schuld für die Situation der Mäuse zuweisen, aber mit einer Information bei Buchung von 2 Nächten und einem Hinweis, wären wir definitiv gar nicht erst angereist. Coral Bay ist ein toller Ort, aber für uns unzumutbar, wenn man dort campen möchte. Man übernachtet quasi auf dem „zu Hause“ der vielen Mäuse.
We stayed at caravan powder site, good location. (just few minutes walk to the beach), good staffs,  shawer room and toilets are clean, love thair hospitality. Highly recommend here❤️

Fantastic caravan park right on the beach. Try to get one of the sites right on the water. 1 to 12 are at the front and 13 to 24 just behind them. Friendly service, clean amenities, good cafe with ok vegan options.

Checked into Peoples Park Coral Bay after a long drive to be greeted by lovely ladies in reception. Very helpful smiling and very pleasant. A nice welcome. Site across from swimming beach. Magnificent water for swimming and snorkelling. Clean facilities and short walk to shops. Always good to be greeted so warmly when checking in. Highly recommended.

Just checked into Peoples Park Caravan Park and was greeted by lovely ladies. Smiling happy and very helpful. Really made you feel welcome after the drive  The site was across from beach within quick walking distance. Clean facilities and good amenities. Would highly recommend to anybody travelling to Coral Bay to book into here. Excellent place to stay and do much to do.

We booked two nights at this camp. First of all, this is the most expensive campsite we’ve stayed at on the West Coast, double what we usually pay.
It’s very well located, BUT the campsite is poorly laid out. We had two different spots over the two nights (one powered, one unpowered), and both were really far from the kitchen, toilets, and showers. The campsites are extremely close to each other, which makes it feel cramped.
The Wi-Fi doesn’t work at all. Also, I left some stuff on the ground later in the day, and at one point a mouse was on it.
It wasn’t a terrible experience overall, but the value for money is very low.
Yeet

A lovely park in a beautiful setting!||Our accommodation in a 2 bedroom ocean view villa was lovely, after a couple of weeks travelling it was so lovely to have a washing machine and dishwasher!||Beds were comfortable and the unit was very clean. ||My only negative comment is that there was no bbq at the unit (although we eventually found a communal bbq area) and the price, it was over $500 a night, ouch||Staff we dealt with were lovely and Coral Bay is a great place to visit
STUNNING

Very beautiful with palm trees, white sandy beaches and turquoise ocean, felt like paradise. Amazing cabins, clean, well equipped and very comfortable. Short walk to all shops, restaurants and the beach. Staff very friendly and helpful, outdoor movies for kids almost every night. Will be back for sure 🥰

Friendly and helpful amazing staff.  We had a leak in our water pipe on our caravan and a maintenance guy came and fixed it for us. Clean and tidy grounds. Immaculate kitchen area. Highly recommend this park.
Amazing, loved Coral Bay will return again.

Stayed here for a couple of nights and the perfect location! Friendly staff, cheap laundry, good camp kitchen and toilets/showers. They were just a bit old but kept very clean. Also loved the little supermarket and cafe out the front, very convenient!

A small but beautiful site where all the amenities are kept to a good standard. Staff are super helpful and will assist with any advice or recommendation sought We will definitely won't be our last visit to People's Park

People’s Park is family heaven with a side of sand in your shoes. Kids disappeared on bikes, came back sunburnt and smiling, and we actually got to relax (a holiday miracle). Snorkelling off the beach felt like jumping into an aquarium, and sunset beers were compulsory. Coral Bay magic!! Can’t wait to be back .

A lovely clean site with friendly staff and close to all amenities, clean toilets and shower facilities.
Would definitely recommend visiting.

People’s park is lovely we visit twice a year it’s oppersite the most beautiful beach in the bay we always chose the villas situated on the hill it’s very quiet and they are always lovely and clean .We highly recommend People’s park.
We look forward to our next holiday in Coral bay 🌞

I’m sure rooms were great but I was on campsite. Lush green areas as watered all the time. Really clean amenities. Only $4 for washing machines.
Super friendly staff. Warmly greeted on arrival.loved my stay and wished I’d had longer. 💕

Friendly service at reception.
Fresh water showers.
Good sized pitches, didn't get a cramped feeling.
Good location.
We had a great view to the beach from our pitch.

Great location. No potable water to camp site. Pretty poor I reckon given the price. Been traveling all around Australia for 5 months. This is one of the most expensive we stayed at and no water at site.

The Peoples Park at Coral Bay, arguably the best in town, but as there are only 2, it's difficult to be sure. The proximity of the park to the beach and therefore the reef is second to none in Australia. The standards maintained by the staff is extraordinary.
Fantastic park in a brilliant location

We stayed on a powered site. They work hard to keep the sites grassed as far as possible. The location was very central - straight across the road from the swimming beach and an easy walk to the shopping centre.
People’s Park is a smaller park and not as cramped as adjacent parks appear. The ablutions are tidy and clean. Great amount of washing machines all in working order with plenty of washing lines too.
Highly recommend this great park when in Coral Bay.
Sensational location, spacious site near the beach.
Just love coming to Coral Bay and staying at People’s Park - efficient, accomodating and friendly Thanks People

Betreffend Lage ist er genial. Wir waren zuerst 5 Nächte  auf diesem Park, haben dann auf den Ningaloo Caravan Park gewechselt. An der Reception war  ein Schild , dass sie komplett ausgebucht sind. Auch online waren keine buchbaren Plätze mehr vorhanden. Es stimmt zwar, dass es ziemlich voll war, aber wir haben jede Nacht irgendwo zwei  bis drei freie Plätze gesehen , wo über Nacht niemand stand. Die Amenities werden nicht gut gepflegt und beim Damenklo riecht es unangenehm. Für die Preis/Leistung empfehlen wir den Ningaloo CP. Grosse Stellplätze und besser gepflegte amenities.
Great place great facilities and friendly staff 👍

Il miglior alloggio a Coral bay in termini di posizione e comodità. Direttamente sulla spiaggia di Coral bay, l’hotel dispone di piazzole per i camper o appartamenti dotati di tutto. Supermercato a pochi metri e ristorante interno molto buono per carne e pesce (velocissimi anche x il take away). Per i bambini presente un parco giochi interno con altalene e giochini vari. Approvato al 100%

Caravan site.ocean view is the best. Have been staying annually for nearly 10 years. Never disappointed.  Despite warning of construction works next door RAC development was no problem.  However PLEASE TIME TO PURCHASE NEW WASHING MACHINES.

Getting home I'm in the state of depression after leaving the bay,.Coral bay is my happy place and the staff at people's park are a part of the reason.  Thanks to all of the team for making my stay special.  I look forward to my next visit to the special place i love.
Michael 💯

We stayed in the Deluxe cabin near the oceanfront camp grounds. Cabin was well planned out and cosy for 3. Stayed for 8 nights. We really enjoyed our stay!

Pros:
- Location was great. Near the water, a short walk or cycle to the shopping arcade for our daily ice cream fixes/bakery/grocery needs/ booking tours etc.
- On site, there was also a spot (fin's bar) to grab coffees and ice cream + a great tour company to book with.
- Cabin was clean and very tidy. Beds comfortable. My kid loved the bunk bed nook. Kitchen was basic but adequate. Light simple meals only. No hand soap so BYO as things r expensive up here. Towels were soft and bed linen and pillows good. Every 3rd day we got a fresh basket of towel, toilet paper rolls and hand towels etc.
- Staff at the reception were great & if we had any issues, they would gladly help assist as best and as promptly as they can. A winner!
- Camp grounds were well maintained and cared for. Laundry facilities were clean and good. BBQs were maintained well.
- Twice weekly outdoor movies are a great idea for the kids.

Cons:
-Maintenance of cabin can be improved. Small things, nothing huge. Like the blinds starting to fail, screen doors can't be locked & some of the kitchen appliances were worn out. As I said, not a Biggie and just mild inconveniences. And staff were very happy to help assist and replace any faulty appliances.
- Would suggest them leaving a broom or some cleaning items inside so we can sweep the interior with as it does get sandy, especially for guests staying longer than a couple of days.
- a few extra hanging hooks in the master and bathroom would be helpful as well! As there was only two rods in the bathroom for towels.

We will be back!! If we can book in.

I stayed at People’s Park for just over a week in one of the villas up top, and it made for a fantastic Coral Bay experience.

One of the first things you’ll notice is how popular this place is—with a mix of caravan sites and villas, it can get busy, but that’s part of Coral Bay’s charm. You’re right on the beachfront, and the town centre is just a short walk away. I was easily getting in 13,000 to 15,000 steps a day! It’s a great spot for families—kids have plenty of space to run around, explore, and enjoy the laid-back holiday vibe.

The highlights:
•	Well-maintained villas and grounds
•	Clean BBQ areas
•	Friendly and responsive staff
•	Fantastic location with beautiful ocean views and sunsets
•	Full kitchen and laundry facilities that really made it feel like a home away from home

The kitchen was well-equipped with a large fridge, electric pan, microwave rice cooker, and even a washing machine—this made it easy for us to cook meals, especially with the food we brought from Perth (groceries can be quite expensive locally). I even brought my multi-pot to make things easier.

A few minor downsides:
•	Water pressure in the villa was quite low—but we worked around this by using the communal showers for the kids
•	A few kitchen items weren’t working, but the staff happily swapped them out when we asked

The location, facilities, and overall setup made this an ideal place to relax and unwind. Snorkelling was still magical, even with some coral bleaching—the calm waters and rainbow-coloured fish made for unforgettable swims.

We’ll definitely be back. It’s a perfect mix of comfort, convenience, and Coral Bay beauty.

Good location, you are right off the beach. Clean facility. Be aware it can get very busy aka loud. We had a 3 family across ours and they thought it was cute to keep their kids screaming till 3am then let them loose to terrorize everyone in the camp around 5.30 making extreme loud noises. This wasn't on the facility for sure,just humans being humans as always... On the other hand, when we checked in ( after 8h drive in the hot car with 2 kids) the lady at the check in was busy playing with her phone. As I approached to her she said u are probably with the other camp. I told her no I booked here so I tagged the location ( I don't my homework ahead and most of the time plan everything in a year in advance or close to) she insisted.  I tried to spell my name to her to check it on the computer she kept looking at her phone instead doing her job. So we drove to other camp, wait in line there again just for them to tell us no u were in the right direction.  Mind that I had a email copy on my hand as well with my booking confirmation which she didn't care to look at first. So then we go back again, wait in line again to this time able to show her the print out she goes " oh u did book here" . I tried to tell her that I was trying to show it to you and spell my name but you seemed busy. She just looked at us annoyed then said here is ur key, ur spot and send us to our way. No map, no information, absolutely nothing was provided.  So because of her we wasted our second day trying to find a way to go skeleton beach and shark sanctuary, later ( towards the evening) we met with a couple on the road showed us in the map provided to them it was actually in walking distance from the camp and you cant drive there... We spend an hour packing the 4x4 camper and another hour to set up for something we could of walk if we could of been informed.. Just for the note, this is the only person we had an issue with. The guy next day was super friendly and helpful,  the staff at the camp always cleaning around/checking and maintaining the places. Its a nice spot, only if we didn't waste 1.5 days out of 3 we had.
We only stayed one night . Super clean and comfortable cabin and the BBQ area was well maintained

Great chill place to stay, has everything you need. Short walk to a safe beach that has amazing views of sunset too! Quick walk to shops and 3min drive to boat ramps. Very family friendly but also for anyway looking for a relaxed place to stay.
Excellent caravan park. Had a wonderful stay, very quiet and comfortable.

Friendly, efficient and helpful staff. We stayed in a cabin on the hilltop, which was very well appointed, very clean, comfortable and quiet with superb views of sunset.Short walk to the beach, beautiful views. Really nice place to spend 4 nights.
Wonderful little stop in Coral Bay, where the desert meets the sea.

My wife & I have been staying in a chalet here since 2016 and believe that the Park has improved its facilities over that period. We meet friends here each year and generally stay for 4 weeks. The chalet staff, ground staff and office staff have been very accommodating over that period. We have booked for next year and can’t wait to come back …. only 11 months to go. A safety suggestion is to maybe have a light installed as you walk up the hill as when park guests come back from any of the restaurants it is quite dark and the ground is relatively uneven & as we are all getting older a fall could mean an early end to a lovely holiday. Cheers & keep up the good work.

Only stayed a couple of days but it was fantastic. Staff were very friendly, grounds and amenities spotless.
Great place to stay!
Thank you

Coral Bay and the People’s Park is our Happy place. Our crew love swimming the bay in the morning paddling snorkelling and everything water related in beautiful warm temperature this time of year. I love the amazing environment and simplicity of the town that seems to cater for everyone without being excessive. Hopefully the new RAC resort doesn’t change that. The People’s. Caravan Park has the best spot, great staff that are always helpful and keep the facilities clean and the park looking great. I especially love the outdoor showers that are run off the deep warm artesian bores  that we use after our morning swim around the bay.
My suggestion would be to be to cycle this lovely warm artesian water thru some baths like Wooramel.

I would like to express my gratitude to the Peoples Park team, who helped recover our vehicle that we managed to get stuck on the beach.
The three guys Stu, Gage and Dillon helped us get free.
It's greatly appreciated
Awesome place to stay
Over-rated and for the amount they charge, not much goes towards Updating toilet blocks.
Great facilities. They had a strict quiet time from 10pm which was appreciated after some other caravan parks we’ve stayed at!

Paid in full a month in advance as requested. Due to a medical emergency, we couldn’t attend and even provided a doctor’s certificate — yet no refund was offered. $700 gone for nothing. To top it off, they still had the nerve to ask if they could rebook it to someone else. My advice: don’t pay a cent until you arrive.
Great location to the beach, anactivities and tours.
Awesome place to visit, across the Road from magnificent beach, lovely staff who bend over backwards to always help you, clean, great views from Villas and love coming back here every Year!!
Great location. Easy walk to the beach. Amenities clean. Lovely big sites with grass.
Amazing spot right next to the beach. Caravan sites a good size. Staff very friendly.
Awesome location, amenities were clean, need a face lift, but nothing crazy. Being able to walk to the beach was excellent. Spotted a couple of Spinifex hopping mice too. Very cute!
We stayed I. The luxury chalet overlooking the bay. The best sunset views and great amenities.
We stayed in the penthouse for three nights over Easter. Staff were really friendly. Room and facilities was incredible! Amazing views of coral bay. I would absolutely stay again!!

We stayed here for 3 nights in a powered site in our van. The staff were amazing, check in was easy and quick and the location was *chefs kiss*. Such a beautiful place of the world, we honestly wanted to stay longer!
Only stayed for one night in an ocean view villa, great room , amazing location . Very clean , well maintained park .

This will always be our favourite place. The only thing I have to say is ‘For the love of God people, (Fellow Campers) the mops in the Ablution blocks are NOT for decoration!!!’
Don’t complain about dirty facilities if you can’t be bothered cleaning up after yourself!
We stayed in ocean view villa. Spotless, amazing view and sunset and everything you need in the kitchen. The layout had also been thought out carefully . highly recommended!! We had an amazing time .

Our family of 5 stayed in an ocean view family villa- beautiful view and we barely noticed the ongoing construction of the neighbouring resort. The small space cooled down quickly with 2 aircons and we had all we needed. Beach across the road and not many steps uphill back to the villa.
Beautiful room with the most amazing view and everone there was so friendly & helpful.

Great place to stay.  We had a two-bedroom villa.  It was perfect.   A short walk to the beach, close to everything and very well-appointed.  Good value too.  We had two very comfortable night here and would do it again.

$85 per night and you can't even refill your own water. Because it's the only camping site at the moment around they increase the price because it's our only choice. I refuse to pay that when we've stayed in far more beautiful up and down the coast.

I hate when companies do this and felt obliged to comment because it literally feels like daylight robbery.
Absolutely  beautiful  location and very well appointed rooms totally worth it
Great location & facilities. Friendly, helpful staff.

Overall the campground was ok, but way too expensive compared to others on the west coast at $85 for just a powered site for one night. The kitchen was clean, the bathroom too but very old. The late check-in was good, but I would definitely not book again at this price point. There is also a mouse infestation here, we have had a mouse in the campervan since the night at the campsite.

Staff were brilliant and extremely helpful. A wonderfully pleasant place to stay generally. From the penthouse the daily sunsets were a highlight.
We left this resort and my wife became pregnant.
I hope it's mine.
Spent 2 glorious nights in an exceptional vista room. With panoramic views of Coral Bay 🪸 😍 👌 absolutely 💯 Loved it.
Out of need we booked a luxury villa here for two nights. But boy, did we get an amazing surprise - worth every dollar, would book again!
Expensive for a caravan park and if you cancel they keep half your money, even if it is 6 months out..
Tenting
I had a great time. Thank you.
Great location. Facilities are good, park was full when we were there
Thanks to Andre and the team for making this enjoyable stay
Positioned right opposite the beach, it's just too busy & everyone is packed in like sardines. This was out of season.
a beautiful park - check in was awesome and this location - brilliant!
Convenient location, 2 mins walk from main beach. Slightly on the pricey side but the TV room had some strong air-conditioning so I'll let it slide
Loved every part of our stay!

What a beautiful and secure place!! They provided even sponges, soap and chucks in BBQ area to clean up after yourself which some places don't usually do. The view is a bonus. Toilet and Shower was the cleanest I've ever seen. Will definitely come back to this place when visiting coral bay again.

I don't have complaints about the park itself, however on the day of our check out our 4 year old slept in and wet the bed. We only realised this close to check out time.
I asked if we could check out an hour late so we could use our washing machine, or use their laundry as a non guest/checked out. The receptionist (who was lovely, no fault of hers) checked there was no one going onto the site (there wasn't ) and asked the manager. The answer was no. For $80 per night, it was very pathetic customer service. Very clear they are just money gauging and have zero interest in their customers. Only option was to pay for another night

Schöner und sauberer Campingplatz direkt am Meer mit toller Badebucht 🌴

leider ist das Korallenriff aufgrund eines Naturereignisses aktuell größtenteils abgestorben, ist sich aber langsam wieder am erholen. Fische sind trotzdem viele zu sehen 🐠🐟🐡

I booked one of their studio villas which was large, well equipped and clean.
Loved the patio for an evening drink and the views over the bay.
Sunset from up there was gorgeous.

Great to just walk to the beach and enjoy swimming and Snorkeling...
We only stayed for 3 nights and the accommodation was more than we required. Very clean and had all the facilities needed for upto 4 people. Would definitely stay there again
Great location.  Clean grounds and camp kitchen. Nice bathroom areas for campers and travellers

Day light robbery!
Booked two night at $82 pernight for a site no more than 3m wide. Might I also add this is UNPOWERED! We only have a side awing tent on the side of our vehicle and we barely fit on the site! Do yourself a favour and stay away! When I asked about cancelling our second night as we have to make our way to Carnarvon for car repairs we were rudely told no refunds and then got told 'nothing we can do'. Worst experience on the road so far! We won't be back! This kind of place is what's wrong with WA tourism. Call in advance or book online but get yourself a spot at the Ningaloo Coral Bay Bayview Campground!
If I could give this place zero stars I would!
Perfect location, friendly people

Very clean amenities, excellent location and young girl in office polite, friendly and efficient
We will definitely be going back.
Well priced as well

We just stayed 7 nights at The People's Park Coral Bay 🪸 and it never disappoints us.
We had an absolute amazing time here in the park, our site was spectacular in the pioneer section bonus having a concrete slab 😍.
Ablutions are well cleaned and was very handy having a trough in the ladies bathroom for my little one to bath in every night.
We are just in awe of the green lawns absolutely love them. The grounds workers are amazing. We accidentally punctured a pipe with tent pegs that we were so apologetic about. That didn't seem to phase them Stu and his team fixed it straight up... We've rebooked for next year 😁
Can't wait to go back. 🏖🌊🌴👙
Had a wonderful family holiday chalets were clean & modern  Staff were extremely helpful .We will be back

A beautiful place to stay at Coral Bay. Large sites, no dust, great amenities, camp kitchen, BBQ'S and tables. A small supermarket 🛒 is attached as well as a great restaurant. The only downside to this park is no potable water to your van. However this is understandable given the location of Coral Bay  and limited potable water which is still available to fill your water bottle for cooking and drinking.
The highlight of our trip down the WA coast!
A perfect spot to set up our van for a few nights. Nice clean amenities and grounds. The are is beautiful with plenty to see.
Great sites, nice clean amenities right across from the beach. All staff. Wry helpful and friendly. Lady in the shop front very helpful with snorkel and goggle info.
We stayed in the caravan park. Very neat and tidy and the facilities were ok.
Friendly, efficient service, fantastic 1st row Beach site.  Thoroughly enjoyed our stay and will be back again.
Green grass. Large sites at the front near the beach, only downside is the key system for the toilets which is a bit annoying.

Location is the only thing I liked about the place. Way over priced for an ‘ocean front’ site which wasn’t next to the sea. Called numerous times throughout my stay to no response (with hours between some calls). And lastly they decided to charge me for ‘losing’ my card to access the park - which I left in the key box outside reception as they had customers in the office. One of the workers lied about the time I left the property/left the key card and had the cheek to tell me I was fortunate not to get a $40 late departure fine - without asking about circumstance. Awful service, won’t be visiting here again👎🏻.
We stayed in a waterview studio apartment, it was perfect - it was clean and had everything we needed.  Wish we could have stayed longer,  highly recommend

First time visit, greatly impressed. Stayed in a Villa, super clean and well maintained, even had an echidna strolling by our door!!  BBQ area is top notch. Park is in excellent location, very safe and extremely well organised. Wonderful park, top marks.
Managed to get a last minute spot (calling can be worth it!) as this is a very popular caravan park. Loved our spot, the kitchen, facilities. Would come back!

We had a fantastic last minute, one night, on a site near the beach, going back for a week shortly and although unable to get similar site, the park and surrounds have a lovely laid back holiday feel. Loved the greenness of the park with lovely trees and lawns being maintained. Amenities were clean and showers fresh.

We recently stayed 5 nights at People's Park on a Caravan site. The park is beautifully green, even although this is the busiest time of the year with caravan sites full every day! The toilets,  laundry and other facilities are clean and well maintained. The staff are friendly and helpful and the park is situated right across the road from the bay.  We didn't use our car at all while we stayed.  I would happily recommend Peoples Park as your destination while in Coral Bay.
A wonderful park within a stones throw to beach. Plus the cafe served the best seafood tasting plate I’ve ever had.
Wonderful grassy sites and a great place to stay.

We had a wonderful stay at Peoples Park. The cabins are clean and comfortable and the staff are all lovely and helpful. There was plenty of school holidays activities for the kids, including colouring in comps, movie nights, extra fish feeding etc. We also love that there is a small shop on site and we could easily book our tours with Coral Bay Eco Tours out the front. We look forward to coming back!
Over priced , move on there are better places for much less , parks are packed in like sardines and way way over priced stop paying these exuberant prices

Beautiful park...very spacious sites and opposite the beach.
Being a retired couple coming in the middle of the school holidays we thought it might be a little too busy...but pleasently surprised...yes there are lots of families but everyone was lovely.

I did read before coming and was told by the staff prior to booking that drinking was not supplied on site, but drinking water is available and definitely not an issue.

If your thinking about where to stay in Coral Bay you cannot go past People's Park...I'd give it more stars if I could

We stayed in a 2 bed sea view villa. It was well equipped and comfortable. The staff are friendly. Nearby Fins restaurant is excellent. The park is a short walk to the beach and coral swimming. Great for families. Excellent boat ramp nearby.

Had an awesome 3 nights stay in June 2024. Stayed on a grass powered site. Full kitchen (could do with and extra tap so there isn’t a cue for the sink). Clean amenities with washing machines available. Great friendly staff. Didn’t try the on-site cafe so can’t comment but the tour booking office were super helpful and friendly! Highly recommend staying at Peoples.
Stayed in the Delux Ocean view cabin. Picture on booking . Com does not accurately depict the view booked out by all the caravans. Room nice. Might give it a miss next time

Had the pleasure of staying at Peoples Park Coral Bay in May 2024 for 3 weeks and could not recommend more highly, an outstanding place to stay in an amazing part of Australia!
Everything was immaculate from the large sites to the ablution blocks, even has fresh water.
The staff were so friendly and helpful!
Couldn’t think of a better place to stay 😄

Ein sehr schöner und sauberer Caravan Park und wenn man Beachfront gebucht hat, fast direkt am Strand. Der untere Toilettenblock wurde vor kurzem erneuert, ist aber leider auch nicht grösser als der alte. Ansonsten ist alles vorhanden was der Campingfreund so braucht. Man kann hier sehr schön baden oder lange Strandwanderungen unternehmen. Zu jeder Tageszeit kann man die fast unberührte Natur genießen. Viele organisierte Touristentouren, dessen Angebot sich im laufe der Jahre stark erweitert hat, stehen auch zur Verfügung. Für die Versorgung mit Lebensmitteln und Campingausrüstung ist 7 Tage die Woche gesorgt. Eine Automatentankstelle ist vorhanden. Restaurants und Bars kamen nun mit den Jahren auch dazu. Wir kommen immer wieder, ein toller Ort.

We stayed at the Penthouse A for 4 nights. The penthouse is spacious and the view is just simply stunning! You can have more than 180 degree view of the horizon, including the coral bay and the sunset view. Also Skippies visit the penthouse every dawn and dusk. Most importantly, the privacy and quietness
of the penthouse is just unbeatable in this crowded little town. Special shoutout to Lily at the reception office! She offered the warmest and most attentive service we have ever experienced in the hospitality industry. Thank you Lily to make the stay exceptional!
terrible, unfriendly staff
Wonderful caravan park great sized sites, terrific staff , a real bonus for Coral Bay
We had a fantastic time staying at peoples park. Our site was great and the staff were exceptional. A great place to stay

Caravan park Niiiice
The staff spare no effort in keeping the laws neet  and green. Feels a bit special. Close to beach.
Nice clean facilities. Campers kitchen well equipped. Close to beach and shopping precinct.
Great service friendly staff and great clean room

We had a beachside powered site and absolutely loved our stay at people’s park.
Clean amenities lovely green lawn and proximity to the beach perfect.
Only downside was a personal trainer on the beach early one morning with very loud music conducting a class. Go for it but no speaker at 7am! Not the parks fault but maybe do follow up?
We had an amazing stay, facilities were some of the best we've experienced. Staff were incredibly welcoming and helpful. Location is insane. Never wanted to leave, can’t wait to come back!

Excellent caravan park
Staff are very friendly and helpful and happy to assist in any situation they can
Excellent spot in Kalbarri
Highly recommend
Clean and showers good

Absolute rip off

Almost $100 for off peak powered caravan site.

The management do their best to hide the fact they also do not have water supply for anyone on the powered sites only leaving it in the fine print of the T&C’s which clearly no one reads as tou would just naturally expect to have water when the website and wiki camps clearly state they have drinking water on both sites.

Will be interesting for the park what they do when RAC go into the town because people won’t be keen to pay $100 p/n if there is another option with water.

Great location for Coral Bay and the magical 5 Fingers Reef. A little tight; but a great caravan park with well looked after gardens and green lawns. Plenty of water but toilet/showers are a little tired but very clean. Camp kitchen/BBQ area is very usable.

Booked a caravan site and then our dog sitter fell through. My partner called up requesting a refund so we could try to find a dog friendly site. He was told no refunds so the call was ended. They then cancelled our booking without a refund and without us requesting for it to be cancelled without a refund. Tried calling back 16 times no answer. Emailed them and asked for them to reinstate our booking as we did not want it to be cancelled, we would have tried to find other arrangements before just throwing our money away. They lied saying we asked for it to be cancelled without the refund which we didn’t, after back and forth they only offered to rebook us one night instead of the two we paid for. Don’t bother with this place

We had the most beautiful stay at this caravan park. Large site for our car & van. Clean amenities and absolutely fabulous location across from the beach.
Whilst clean drinking water points are provided it would be great to have potable water access at each site.
Nevertheless I would highly recommend.

Recently stayed in Ocean view 2 bedroom villa. The whole holiday experience was 10/10. Accomadation was super clean, tidy and very well presented. Fresh towels dropped off evey couple of days and the location was nice and quiet. Fantastic place to stay.

Right opposite the Beach at Coral Bay & within walking distance of everything.

Booked online & received various emails prior to arrival. Checkin simple & quick - security buzzer to access sites.

Sites have some shade, fairly flat & some with grass or artificial grass & others hard stand.

Amenities ok - Park is 'split into upper & lower level. Couple of separate blocks  with laundries, with a large camp kitchen (right at back of park - probably one in lower level as well).

Water in taps is bore water - potable water is available at various spots in parkfor drinking & cooking but not to fill water tanks.

At front of park is small block of shops incl a cafe/restaurant that does all meals but not every day.  We had various seafood packs from there & ate them across the road in the Park watching the sunset.

Easy access to each of the businesses that offer ocean/reef experiences.

Generally a good stopping point - fair bit of competition in town
Fantastic park, great facilities and excellent staff.

Loved our stay at Peoples Park in the front section of the powered camping sites. Lovely grassy site. Across from the beach, close to amenities. Close to shops, pub, restaurants etc. It is expensive and we didn’t hook into the water as it’s not drinkable.  Would highly recommend.

Nice park, good amenities  and facilities. But way over priced for a highly over rated place. If you snorkel and scuba great place, if you stay on dry land, just call in on your way through to say your been there.

This site is clean and well located. However, the website doesn’t mention that fresh water is limited. You’re not able to fill up caravan or campervan tanks and the pitch water supply is bore water. This would be good to know when booking as we had come straight from Cape Range National Park which was off grid. The pitches are close together so despite the water conservation high numbers of bookings for the area are still taken. There is a potable water dispenser at the petrol station which was 20 cents/litre.
Great camping site, friendly staff, nice activities for kids during the Easter holidays, and 1 minute away from a spectacular beach. The highlight of our trip so far !
Amazing spot with kids

Wir hatten ein Familien Bungalow mit zwei Schlafzimmer, Grosse Küche mit allem waa es braucht und sauber, tolle Terasse mit Schatten, genügend Platz zum Sitzen und Essen sowie Meerblick. Alles bestens.
Brill
Viel zu teuer. Der Platz nebenan ist besser und preiswerter. Sollte man vorher checken
Beautiful place to stay, fantastic staff, very clean and cool villa's. Everything you need 💕

We stayed in the luxury hilltop villa.

It was perfect for us. Spacious, good air conditioning. comfortable and with parking right next to the villa.

If you need internet for work purposes, don't worry. There is a 5G mast barely metres from the villas.

I would stay here again in a flash.
I didn't rent a room, just a camp site, grounds staff were polite and helpful, everything was good, amenities clean, nice place, would return again
my favourite place to stay
Gute Lage, netter Service, Zimmer gut. Um die Bungalows rum etwas unordentlich, W-LAN nur im Küchenbereich. Zimmer sauber und gut bestückt.
Better than others here

Lage top, Staff sehr hilfsbereit, gebuchte Cabin hat leider nicht unsere Erwartungen getroffen: Cabin innen sehr geräumig & sauber, Küche sehr gut ausgestattet, allerdings Atmosphäre wie im OP Saal. Alles weiß, und dazu noch eine mega grelle Beleuchtung. Eingangstür & Terrasse waren leider sehr ungepflegt & lange nicht gesäubert worden. Auf der Terrasse sind unzählige Spinnweben! |Zweiter Minuspunkt bekommt die nicht vorhandene Mülltrennung. Das geht heutzutage garnicht mehr!
Mooie camping met vriendelijke mensen en een super uitzicht op zee

I liked everything, even if it was a bit pricey, I would definitely stay there again, you are very close to the beach which is the main thing, close to restaurant and shop.
The room was very big and tidy. everyone was nice and friendly, you will not regret staying there.
Clean and nicely laid out. Easy access to everything. Staff are friendly and helpful

Must stay!!! ❤️We only had 1 night ….we should have stayed longer. Nicely kept green CP ….expensive but worth it! Must bring own water but showers great!Snorkel in the bay …..see the Spangled Emperor fish. Just beautiful!!

Ideal place to stay at Coral Bay right opposite beach. Hot outdoor showers, little Cafe & Mart out front, cool breeze all day, villas well appointed, clean bbq areas. Walking distance to everything. Villas 19 - 23 have the best ocean views. They  have 2 separate bedrooms & balcony overlooking the park/beach
Very friendly staff and excellent facilities.
Clean, amenities, clean and well stocked camp kitchen, generous size sites. Friendly staff. No pets is awesome. 👍👍

Van site -  1st 3 nights were up the top, had shadecloth flooring, good site and amenities  had to move for days 4/5 to 'millionaires row'. Whinging prick behind me said he had complained about us being there as his friends normally have that site, was this why we had to move sites? Far from it's title millionaires row, the site had sand base only, poor value @ $87 / night, have not encountered a price this high across Australia ever. Fail to see the value of a high priced 'beachfront' location 3 rows back. When making a booking, staff should advise all guests at the time of booking water connection to van is unadvisable due to very poor quality and risk to van water system. Drinking water is available from 2 sources in the park. No pets a bonus. Coral Bay is a nice place to visit, caravan park is way overpriced. Good meals available at Fin's, Bakery good.
Great location and facilities.  Showers have fresh water

Best place to stay in Coral Bay. Had a sea view hilltop villa. Great view and clean, comfortable villa. Great service from the friendly staff. Dont know where the negative reviewers stayed. Owner and staff were excellent. Will return.

Got the 2nd row ocean front powered site @ $85 (which was the most expensive of the 12 powered sites we booked for our Perth to Exmouth trip but the only one with a view of Coral Bay). But I’m glad i didn’t book the Pioneer grass site ($78) as this area furthest from the beach and with the more dated ablution block.
Very nice, really enjoyed our 2 nights, shame we could not extend the booking.
Cabin was lovely, beach straight across the road is beautiful. Staff are very friendly and competent at their work

Wonderful camping experience we were so happy with our site next to the toilets - sounds funny but our daughter goes a lot in the night so worked out for us! The kids loved the playground and made new friends.  Love the shopping arcade close by especially fins!

Great stay in Coral Bay. Four of us. We had ocean view family villa plus a family studio. The ocean view villa definitely worth the extra money for the view and facilities.  Great reception and maintenance staff, helpful and responsive. Location is excellent - the hilltop villas have the view plus easy boardwalk access to the beach.  Also great barbecue facilities with these villas. Would choose here to stay again (but  Coral Bay reefs have not yet recovered from major 2022 bleaching event - very sad).

Pretty average park with sandy, unlevel sites.
No drinking water for caravan connection. Abultions consisted of one unisex toilet and a long walk to showers and gender specific toilets. Not recommended.
Fantastic location and well maintained park,walk across the road to the beach and snorkelling reef.
Really nice spot to camp. Good clean facilities.
Great Caravan Park. Directly across the road and easy access to the beach.
Stayed at both caravan parks over a couple of days - this one has the better location but the other one definitely trumps the facilities of Peoples Park.

Great location and amenities. We booked last minute and originally had to move every night to a new space with a camper trailer. But the lovely Anna on staff helped to find us a place we could set up long term for our stay. She really went above and beyond. Highly recommend staying here!
Very pricey...but good sized campsites... amenities were good... location is awesome especially for those with young children...
Love it here the best & closest park to beach we stayed up the back of park but was so lovely only a short stroll to the beach, loos n showers nice n clean. Definitely recommended 👌
